text: Congratulations on opening your heart and home to a new companion. There's something quietly wonderful about the day a pet comes home, that first moment of figuring each other out, the slow building of trust, the way an ordinary room suddenly feels a little more alive. May the two of you share countless small joys, muddy paws and warm naps and the comfort of knowing someone is always glad to see you. Wishing you patience for the learning days and laughter for all the rest. Welcome to the very best kind of friendship.
